description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a prominent control panel and a large display area. The front panel is adorned with two red joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting a two-player setup. The left side panel displays a stylized illustration of a dark bird, possibly a raven, rendered in bold purples and blacks. The right side panel features a dynamic drawing of a character wielding a large sword, dressed in a red outfit with spiky black hair, set against a gradient blue background. The marquee area above the screen bears the faint word 'HERO' in a stylized font, with a subtle purple and blue gradient. The cabinet is primarily constructed from dark-colored materials, with vibrant artwork providing visual interest on the sides and front.
description: A tall, dark arcade game cabinet with colorful side artwork, dual joysticks, and a large display area. Features bold character and bird illustrations and a faint 'HERO' marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual joystick and button control panel, large display area, and faint 'HERO' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, stylized raven artwork in dark purples and blacks.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned dark back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a dynamic illustration of a sword-wielding character in red attire against a blue gradient background.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and twelve colored buttons arranged in two-player side-by-side layout, with a purple and blue color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Faint 'HERO' text in a stylized font with a purple and blue gradient background; subtle and minimalistic.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Left side features a large, stylized raven in dark purples and blacks; right side displays a character with spiky hair and a sword in red and blue tones.
